steps.title: Identify the sentence structure
steps.content: The subject “The atomic structure of an element” is a noun phrase. The object “the element's place on the periodic table” is also a noun phrase. The blank must contain a main verb connecting them.

steps.title: Choose the main verb form
steps.content: C) determines is the finite verb form required to fill the main verb position. The other choices are non-finite forms—an infinitive, a participle, and a perfect participle—that cannot serve as the main verb by themselves. That matches choice C — C is correct.
